ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was last updated */,
  "repo_type" TEXT /* Type of the repository (e.g., public, private) */,
  "repo_status" TEXT /* Status of the repository (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Default branch of the repository (e.g., main, master) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each commit (CommitID) */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the commit belongs to */,
  "committer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date and time the commit was made */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch the commit was made to */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "parent_commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent commit (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_committer_id FOREIGN KEY ("committer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., .js, .py, .java) */,
  "file_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the file (e.g., executable, readable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_files_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit the change belongs to */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the change was made to */,
  "lines_changed" INTEGER /* Total number of lines changed */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added */,
  "lines_deleted" INTEGER /* Number of lines deleted */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, deletion, modification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_changes_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_changes_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES commit_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., code review, general) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_comments_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit the review belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., code review, general) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_reviews_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "tag_color" TEXT /* Color of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_tags_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the commit */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the commit was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access (e.g., IP address, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_access_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_repositories" (
  "user_repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-repository assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the repository (e.g., admin, developer, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user in the repository (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_repositories_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_repositories_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Token used for session authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session expires */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was last updated */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., interface, notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "committer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committer */,
  "commit_count" INTEGER /* Number of commits made by the committer */,
  "total_lines_changed" INTEGER /* Total number of lines changed by the committer */,
  "total_lines_added" INTEGER /* Total number of lines added by the committer */,
  "total_lines_deleted" INTEGER /* Total number of lines deleted by the committer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was created */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_metrics_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_metrics_committer_id FOREIGN KEY ("committer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_metrics_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "committer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committer */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date and time the commit was made */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch the commit was made to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the commit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical record was created */,
  "history_type" TEXT /* Type of historical record (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_history_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_history_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_history_committer_id FOREIGN KEY ("committer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit */,
  "dependent_commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the dependent commit */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., parent, child) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_dependencies_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_dependencies_dependent_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit the label belongs to */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the label was created */,
  "label_color" TEXT /* Color of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_labels_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)
